options.content:
- Some parameters use [automatically generated metrics](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/vmagent/#automatically-generated-metrics)
- Some parameters are available when installing [cardinality limiter](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/vmagent/#cardinality-limiter)

- `Series Add` is calculated for the last `1h`. Thresholds: 500, 1000
- `Series` ceiling is taken from `scrape_series_limit`. Thresholds: 50%, 80%
- `Dropped` is calculated over the last `24h`
- `Size` ceiling is taken from `-promscrape.maxScrapeSize` by default. Thresholds: 16mb, 32mb
- `Duration` ceiling is taken from `scrape_timeout_seconds`. Thresholds: 50%, 80%
